immediate_packages.purpose: Re-download already validated external images and stage/upload to warehouse-backed storage manifest only.
immediate_packages.writes: No DB writes in dry-run. Later apply may upload storage objects only.

immediate_packages.purpose: For failed TCGdex rows, find source-backed replacements from PokemonTCG, TCGCollector, Malie, or approved source lanes.
immediate_packages.writes: No DB writes. No exact claims without source proof.

immediate_packages.purpose: If any existing Supabase storage paths failed, verify object existence/path/bucket and repair plan.
